name: Retro Analog Brutalist
tagline: Retro-tech brutalist deck with electric blue, acid yellow, blocky panels, glow effects, and deliberately unusual compositions.

palette.description: Black base with electric blue, acid yellow, white panels, and muted gray notes.

typography.style: Vintage computer-like monospace display with neutral sans body for compact technical copy.

best_for: Creative tech launches, digital marketing pitches, portfolio decks, and product stories that should feel bold, strange, retro, and high contrast.
avoid_for: Conservative board reporting, quiet research synthesis, or any setting where brutalist contrast would distract from the message.

source_inspiration.name: Plus AI Retro Analog Presentation Template
source_inspiration.notes: Independent page-by-page HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview style: black, blue, yellow, white, glow effects, block panels, terminal typography, and non-traditional compositions. It does not reuse source slide assets.
